verdict: Mostly playable but features inappropriately short holds and overly complex syncopations for an Easy chart.

issues.problem: Holds of 183ms (8th-note duration) are extremely short and will easily drop or feel like glitchy taps rather than holds, which is highly frustrating, especially on an Easy chart.
A series of consecutive half-note jumps (LR, DR, UR, LR) creates an abrupt and inappropriate difficulty spike at the very end of an Easy chart.
Frequent syncopated rhythms (dotted quarters and off-beat eighth notes) make the physical reading and step-coordination too complex for a standard Easy difficulty.
